watson.config.action_reverse.description: If enabled, it won't show the reverse action of a player that happend
watson.config.amount_rows.description:
Sets amount of rows used for autopage feature
CoreProtect Only
watson.config.auto_page.description: If enabled, this allows to automatically step thru max allowed pages
watson.config.chat_timeout.description: The minimum amount of seconds between sent chat messages by the mod
watson.config.coreprotect_command.descri: Choose the command you can use for CoreProtect
watson.config.coreprotect_messages.descr:
Disables CoreProtect lookup messages
This will disable the spam from auto pages.
watson.config.displayed.description: If true, watson will draw stuff
Ores are grouped even in creative
watson.config.highlight.description:
What gets highlighted in chat
All entries should have this order: <style><color>;<text>
watson.config.highlight_case_sensitive.d: If enabled, the highlight patterns will be case sensitive
watson.config.highlight_sound.descriptio:
Set the highlight sound with a sound event key
As example entity.cat.hiss and block.anvil.break
More sound events to be found at:
https://www.digminecraft.com/lists/sound_list_pc.php
watson.config.highlight_sound_enable.des: Enables making sound when something gets highlight.
watson.config.highlight_sound_volume.des: Sets the volume that the highlight sound will play.
watson.config.linked_creation.descriptio: If true, block creations will be linked by vectors
watson.config.linked_destruction.descrip: If true, block destruction will be linked by vectors
watson.config.logblock_messages.descript:
Disables LogBlock lookup messages
This will disable the spam.
watson.config.max_auto_pages.description: Amount of pages that is allowed when auto page is enabled
watson.config.max_auto_pages_loop.descri: Amount of automatic stepped thru pages
watson.config.only_ore_block.description: Only shows block in block space
watson.config.ore_linewidth.description: Uses this linewidth for all ores if oreOutlineThicker is enabled
watson.config.ore_outline_thicker.descri:
Ore outline thicker when enabled
If false, uses the integer for outline in watson blocks list config
Default line width: 1
watson.config.outline_shown.description: If true, wireframe outline will be displayed
watson.config.overriding_actions.descrip:
What actions gets overriden
All entries should have this order: <playername><action>;<reverse action>
watson.config.page_lines.description: Number of chat lines in a page
watson.config.plugin.description: Which plugin does the server use
watson.config.post_count.description: Number of edits to be run post
watson.config.pre_count.description: Number of edits to be fetched
watson.config.prism_messages.description:
Disables Prism lookup messages
This will disable the spam.
watson.config.reformat_query_results.des: Format query in chat more compact if enabled
watson.config.region_info_timeout.descri: Sets the timeout in seconds when right clicking with a wooden sword
watson.config.selection_shown.descriptio: If enabled selection will be shown
watson.config.smaller_render_box.descrip: Blocks will have a smaller rendering box
watson.config.ss_player_directory.descri: Subdirectory named after the currently selected player is created to hold screenshots of his edits if enabled
watson.config.ss_player_suffix.descripti: Name of current selected player is appended to screenshot files
watson.config.teleport_command.descripti:
Sets teleport command
The different format to use inside the placeholders are:
i for integer or d for decimal numbers
Placeholders to use are:
{x:format}, {y:format}, {z:format}, {world}
watson.config.time_ordered_deposits.desc:
If true, ore deposits should be numeric labeled when mined
When false it gets ordered in descending order of rareness of the ore
watson.config.use_chat_highlights.descri: If true, chat highlighter will be enabled
watson.config.watson_join_messages.descr: If true, it will disable the join messages that are sent by Watson
watson.config.watson_prefix.description: The start of all Watson commands, without a slash
watson.error.anno.position: Use the LogBlock tool to set a position
watson.error.highlight_sound: Sound event key like 'entity.cat.hiss' isn't valid, you currently got %s
watson.gui.button.ledger.ledgermode.hove: Click to cycle thru the modes.\nClick the other button to go backwards.
watson.gui.label.ledger.info.button: Select the %s you want to see.
watson.gui.label.ledger.info.pages: Amount of pages that Ledger will send.
watson.gui.label.ledger.info.rolledback: Will only show edits that are rolledback or not or ignored.
watson.gui.label.ledger.info.source:
Sources are comma seperated.
To invert a source put '!' before the source.
Examples for a source are 'Annevdl29' and '@tnt'.
watson.gui.label.ledger.info.time:
You can specify durations with 's' seconds, 'm' minute, 'h' hour, 'd' day and 'w' week.
For example '7w4d31m42s'.
watson.gui.label.playeredit.checkbox: Sort by amount of Block edits
watson.hotkey.keybind_command_co_inspect:
Executes /co i
(Set Plugin in Generic to CoreProtect and only works with CoreProtect)
watson.hotkey.keybind_query_after.descri:
Query edits after
(Set Plugin in Generic to LogBlock and only works with LogBlock)
watson.hotkey.keybind_query_before.descr:
Query edits before
(Set Plugin in Generic to LogBlock and only works with LogBlock)
watson.message.autopage.finished: Gone thru max pages with auto page
watson.message.blockedit.date_form: The date must take the form YYYY-MM-DD.
watson.message.blockedit.date_not_valid: %s is not a valid date of the form YYYY-MM-DD.
watson.message.blockedit.deleted_matchin: Deleted %d out of %d save files matching "%s".
watson.message.blockedit.deleted_older: Deleted %d out of %d save files older than %s 00:00:00.
watson.message.blockedit.next_page: Use "/%s file list %s %d" to see the next page.
watson.message.blockedit.no_matching: There are no save files matching "%s".
watson.message.blockedit.no_player: No current player set, so you must specify a file name.
watson.message.blockedit.not_loaded: The file %s could not be loaded.
watson.message.blockedit.not_saved: The file %s could not be saved.
watson.message.blockedit.nothing_between: There are no save files older than %s 00:00:00 to delete.
watson.message.config.group_ores_creativ: Grouping of ores in creative mode is %s
watson.message.config.label: Label display is %s
watson.message.config.max_auto_page: Up to %d pages of "/lb coords" results will be stepped through automatically
watson.message.config.post_count: By default, "/w post" will return %d edits.
watson.message.config.pre_count: By default, "/w pre" will return %d edits.
watson.message.config.reformat_query_res: Compact formatting of query results is %s
watson.message.config.region_info_timeou: Automatic region info timeout is set to %.2f seconds
watson.message.config.ss_date_directory: Anonymous screenshot subdirectory format specifier set to %s
watson.message.config.time_ordered_depos: Ore deposits will be numbered according to their timestamps (only)
Ore deposits will be numbered in decreasing order of scarcity
watson.message.config.watson.disabled:
Watson is now disabled
To re-enable, use: /%s config watson on
watson.message.config.watson.prefix: Watson command prefix is set to %s
watson.message.cp.auto_page.error: Database busy, auto page stopped with a CoreProtect error, try again
watson.message.cp.auto_page.start: Auto pages will go thru %d pages.
watson.message.deposit.next_page: Use "/%s ore %d" to view the next page.
watson.message.deposit.no_diamond: There are no diamond ore deposits.
watson.message.deposit.no_teleport: There are no ore deposits to teleport to.
watson.message.edits.none_edits: There are no stored edits for %s.
watson.message.filters.edits_accepted: Edits by the following players will be accepted.
watson.message.filters.filter_added: Added a filter to accept edits by %s.
watson.message.filters.filters_edits: No filters are set. All edits are accepted.
watson.message.info.no_player_time: You might not have time or a player set yet
watson.message.info.no_logblock: You haven't set or not using LogBlock as plugin
watson.message.join.plugin.info: Don't forget to set the plugin in config screen
watson.message.join.ledger.info: Check Watson menu for Ledger menu, it is preferred to use the GUI instead of commands for Ledger.
watson.message.join.ledger.nomessage: Ledger won't sent any messages in chat, you will find all info in the Watson GUI instead.
watson.message.lb.more_diamond_placed: Player placed more diamonds than were destroyed.
watson.message.lb.silktouch_diamond: Did the player place and destroy previously silk touched diamonds?
